news.paragraph: Capital One (COF) has seen its stock price decline following an acquisition announcement, though one analysis suggests it is undervalued with a DCF valuation of $320. Investors recently rejected a "golden parachute" proposal, indicating continued focus on risks associated with the company's operations and its integration of Discover. The company's capital allocation strategy, including dividends and the Discover integration, is under scrutiny.

headlines.title: Is COF Undervalued? DCF Says Worth $320
Capital One Financial Corporation (COF) Fell Following the Acquisition Announcement
Do Capital One’s (COF) Dividends and Discover Integration Reveal a New Capital Allocation Playbook?
Capital One Investors Reject Golden Parachute Proposal As Risks Stay In Focus
